ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of the organisation (e.g., Government, Non-Profit, Private) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the organisation */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the organisation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organisation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organisation is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organisation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organisation's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., None, Office, Warehouse) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the facility is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the facility is located */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the facility's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the vehicle belongs to */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., ERV) */,
  "catalog" TEXT /* Catalog of the vehicle */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the vehicle (e.g., Vehicles) */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Item name of the vehicle (e.g., ERV) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vehicle */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was purchased */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership status of the vehicle (e.g., Owned, Leased, Rented) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., Petrol, Diesel, Electric) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., Available, In Use, Out of Service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vehicle's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the location belongs to */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location (e.g., parking lot, garage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the hierarchy belongs to */,
  "level_1" TEXT /* Level 1 of the hierarchy */,
  "level_2" TEXT /* Level 2 of the hierarchy */,
  "level_3" TEXT /* Level 3 of the hierarchy */,
  "level_4" TEXT /* Level 4 of the hierarchy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hierarchy was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hierarchy's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hierarchies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance personnel, emergency responder) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or deactivated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the assignment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the maintenance event belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance event occurred */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance event (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance event was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the maintenance event's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the access event belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access event belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access event occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access event (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
